title: Community sponsors: About the process - Canada.ca
content:
New private sponsorship applications Paused
Community sponsors can only apply to sponsor refugees through the Blended Visa Office-Referred (BVOR) Program at this time.
We’ll continue to process applications that have already been submitted.
Learn more about this pause .
Some community organizations can sponsor refugees abroad to come live in Canada permanently. This means you’ll support them emotionally and financially, usually for 1 year.
To sponsor a refugee, your community organization must:
- make sure they already have refugee status
- create a settlement plan
- prove you have the money to support them
Other organizations and individuals can also partner with you as co–sponsors .
